mechanics.excerpt: Ives Compact or the Saiph Triumvirate_ Four points makes the character well-connected within large state. such as the Free Worlds League the Outworlas Alliance For points the character i5 well-connected throughout the Inner Sphere or Clan homeworlds_ To use the trait to find contact; the player character must first spend 206 hours looking for contact, Then the character must make Streetwise (for criminal or underworld contacts).
